name: polymarket
description: Comprehensive Polymarket skill covering prediction markets, API, trading, market data, and real-time WebSocket data streaming. Build applications with Polymarket services, monitor live trades, and integrate market predictions.
capabilities: Access Polymarket REST API documentation for markets, events, and trading
Understand WebSocket real-time data streaming for live market updates
Implement trading strategies using CLOB (Central Limit Order Book) API
Fetch market data, prices, order books, and user positions
Integrate crypto price feeds from Binance and Chainlink oracles
Build monitoring tools for trades, orders, and market comments
author: 2025Emma
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill containing only informational content about Polymarket API endpoints and WebSocket data streaming. All static findings are false positives: backticks are Markdown code formatting, path traversal patterns are relative documentation links, and C2 keywords are legitimate trading terms (activity, order, trade, rfq). No executable code, scripts, or actual credential handling present.
valueStatement: Polymarket is the world's largest prediction market platform. This skill provides complete documentation for building applications with their REST API, trading endpoints, and real-time WebSocket data streaming for live market data.
limitations: Does not execute trades - only provides API documentation
Requires separate API key for authenticated endpoints
Rate limits apply based on Polymarket API policies
Must use external TypeScript/Python clients for actual implementation

useCases.title: Build Trading Applications
useCases.description: Create automated trading bots and applications that interact with Polymarket order books and execute trades via API

useCases.title: Monitor Market Activity
useCases.description: Track live prediction market prices, volume, and sentiment data in real-time for research and analysis

useCases.title: Access Historical Data
useCases.description: Query historical prices, trade records, and market resolution data for academic and market research

promptTemplates.title: Fetch Market Data
promptTemplates.scenario: Get information about a specific prediction market
promptTemplates.prompt: How do I fetch market data for a specific Polymarket event using the Gamma API? Show me the endpoint and parameters needed.

promptTemplates.title: Real-Time Updates
promptTemplates.scenario: Subscribe to live market price changes
promptTemplates.prompt: How do I set up a WebSocket connection to receive real-time price updates for a Polymarket market using the Real-Time Data Client?

promptTemplates.title: Place Orders
promptTemplates.prompt: What are the requirements and endpoints for placing and managing orders via the Polymarket CLOB API?

promptTemplates.title: Authentication
promptTemplates.prompt: How do I create and authenticate API keys for the Polymarket CLOB endpoints? What headers are required?

bestPractices: Implement proper error handling for API rate limit responses (429 status)
Use WebSocket subscriptions instead of polling for real-time data
Validate message payloads before processing in production applications
Subscribe to specific markets only rather than using wildcard subscriptions
antiPatterns: Polling the API continuously without respecting rate limits
Storing API credentials in client-side code or version control
Processing all market subscriptions without applying filters
Ignoring connection errors and not implementing reconnection logic

faq.question: What programming languages are supported?
faq.answer: Polymarket provides official TypeScript and Python clients. The REST API can be accessed from any HTTP client.

faq.question: What are the rate limits for the API?
faq.answer: Rate limits vary by endpoint. General limits are 5000 requests per 10 seconds. See the full rate limit documentation for details.

faq.question: How do I get started with trading API access?
faq.answer: Create API keys through the Polymarket developer portal. Requires L1 and L2 authentication headers for trading endpoints.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: This skill only provides documentation. Your API credentials and trading activity remain secure on your local system.

faq.question: Why am I getting rate limit errors?
faq.answer: You may be sending too many requests. Implement exponential backoff and consider using WebSocket subscriptions for real-time data.

faq.question: How does this compare to other prediction market APIs?
faq.answer: Polymarket offers free trading with no platform fees, real-time WebSocket data, and access to the largest prediction market volume.
